description.overview: A true American breed, the Black and Tan Coonhound is an easygoing, friendly dog with a melodious voice. They're excellent family companions.
description.history: The Black and Tan Coonhound originated in United States.
description.temperament: Known for being easygoing, friendly, alert.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A true American breed, the Black and Tan Coonhound is an easygoing, friendly dog with a melodious voice. They're excellent family companions.
